responses.summary: skills/update/SKILL.md Step 7.6 'both present' branch rewritten. Removed the contradictory 'union (dedup)' language. New instruction: 'append every entry from allowedTools to the end of permissions.allow (preserving order within each list), then drop the legacy allowedTools key. Do NOT dedup.' This matches the byte-for-byte preservation rule at the end of the section. Added regression test tests/test-cli.sh:test_update_skill_migration_is_non_destructive that (a) requires additive/preserving language, (b) requires explicit 'do not dedup' in the section, (c) rejects positive migration instructions containing 'dedup' like 'union the two lists (dedup)'. Negative control: reintroducing the old 'dedup' wording fails the new test; restored, 70/70 pass.
